skills.problem: What should we post next with real demand signals?
skills.input: TikTok/YouTube/Instagram trend snippets, search hints, comments/DM FAQs
skills.output: Ranked topic backlog + platform fit + hook directions + CTA
skills.handoff: Send top 3 topics into Creatop script workflow

skills.problem: How to improve first-3-second retention?
skills.input: Raw script or opening lines + target audience + product angle
skills.output: Ranked hook variants with rationale and filming complexity
skills.handoff: Push winning hook into Creatop script composer

skills.problem: How to run creator sponsorships without chaos?
skills.input: Brand brief, deliverables, timeline, revision/payment rules
skills.output: Deal plan, risk flags, revision/payment checklist
skills.handoff: Export checklist into team SOP / Notion / Feishu

skills.problem: How to repurpose one idea across TikTok/Reels/Shorts?
skills.input: Source concept/video + channel goals + constraints
skills.output: Platform-specific recut matrix with hooks/CTA/length
skills.handoff: Generate platform-specific script variants in Creatop

skills.problem: Will this content hurt monetization or distribution?
skills.input: Draft script/caption + product claim language + platform context
skills.output: Risk audit + safer rewrite suggestions
skills.handoff: Run final safe version through Creatop publishing workflow

skills.problem: How to turn a brand brief into creator-native scripts?
skills.input: Brand brief, ICP, product facts, forbidden claims
skills.output: Script pack (angles, hooks, CTA, proof points)
skills.handoff: Batch-generate and review scripts via Creatop

skills.problem: Which content actions actually move outcomes?
skills.input: Content list + campaign metadata + simple outcome fields
skills.output: Lightweight attribution view + insight notes
skills.handoff: Feed winning patterns back to Creatop templates

skills.problem: How to ship weekly content without burnout?
skills.input: Weekly goals, team bandwidth, channel priorities
skills.output: Sprint board + realistic publishing cadence
skills.handoff: Use sprint outputs to drive Creatop batch generation

skills.problem: How to present creator proof to close better deals?
skills.input: Results, examples, testimonials, benchmark data
skills.output: One-page proof pack for outreach
skills.handoff: Attach proof pack in outreach sequence

skills.problem: How to convert comments/DMs into content pipeline?
skills.input: Comments, DMs, objections, FAQ snippets
skills.output: Intent clusters + prioritized content backlog
skills.handoff: Send high-priority clusters into Creatop script queue

skills.problem: Which creators are most likely to convert for a specific product?
skills.input: Product positioning, target ICP, creator profile links/metrics, budget constraints
skills.output: Ranked creator shortlist with fit scores, outreach angle, and risk flags
skills.handoff: Use top-ranked creators in outreach sequence and brief generation

skills.problem: What product defects and dissatisfaction patterns are hidden in reviews/comments?
skills.input: Low-star reviews, comments, support tickets, return notes
skills.output: Defect clusters by severity, frequency, and fix priority with evidence snippets
skills.best_for: Product and content teams diagnosing quality gaps
skills.handoff: Convert top defect clusters into product fixes + expectation-setting scripts

skills.problem: How does our listing underperform compared with competitors?
skills.input: Your listing text + competitor listings + product constraints
skills.output: Gap report across title, bullets, proof, offer framing, and action priorities
skills.handoff: Send priority rewrites into script/copy generation workflows

skills.problem: Where is tracking broken across ad click to purchase flow?
skills.input: Event samples, pixel/CAPI config notes, UTM examples, checkout flow map
skills.output: Tracking gap audit with severity, suspected cause, and fix checklist
skills.handoff: Apply fixes then rerun attribution review with creator-attribution-lite

skills.problem: When should we react to competitor price/promo changes without destroying margin?
skills.input: Your price/margin constraints + competitor price snapshots + promo context
skills.output: Price-gap alerts with recommended actions under margin guardrails
skills.handoff: Send accepted actions to promo calendar and listing updates

skills.problem: What repeatable reasons are driving refunds and returns?
skills.input: Refund logs, return reason text, support transcripts, order metadata
skills.output: Reason clusters with root-cause hypotheses and prevention actions
skills.best_for: Reducing avoidable refunds and preserving margins
skills.handoff: Feed top reasons into product fixes + pre-purchase expectation copy

skills.problem: Why do some UGC openings retain while others fail in first seconds?
skills.input: UGC script/video transcript + target audience + product angle
skills.output: Hook diagnosis + improved variants + execution notes
skills.handoff: Use winning hooks in short-video-hook-lab and script packs

skills.problem: Which checkout steps are leaking intent and killing purchase completion?
skills.input: Checkout flow notes, abandonment signals, user complaints, policy constraints
skills.output: Friction map with severity, likely cause, and fix priority
skills.handoff: Push fixes into sprint board and rerun after implementation

skills.problem: How should we schedule promos to maximize conversion without operational overload?
skills.input: Campaign goals, inventory limits, creator slots, paid budget windows
skills.output: Weekly promo calendar with channel mix, owner tasks, and risk notes
skills.handoff: Use outputs in batch-content-sprint-os and deal ops execution

skills.problem: How to improve creator outreach reply and conversion rates?
skills.input: Creator segments, offer structure, proof assets, channel constraints
skills.output: Multi-step outreach sequence with personalization hooks and follow-up logic
skills.best_for: Scaling creator outreach while keeping quality
skills.handoff: Run sequence with creator-fit scorer shortlist and track responses

skills.problem: How to handle live objections without killing trust or conversion?
skills.input: Live objections, product facts, offer terms, proof snippets, risk constraints
skills.output: Objection diagnosis + reply pack + escalation ladder + close prompts
skills.best_for: TikTok live selling sessions and moderator playbooks
skills.handoff: Save winning objection scripts into Creatop live SOP templates

skills.problem: How to convert TikTok comments into safe, actionable sales conversations?
skills.input: Comment threads, product facts, offer terms, shipping/return policy, risk constraints
skills.output: Intent-tagged reply scripts + CTA ladder + risk-safe alternatives
skills.best_for: Pre-sale comment conversion in TikTok Shop workflows
skills.handoff: Store winning replies in Creatop comment response templates

skills.problem: How to evaluate creators quickly without overcomplicating the decision?
skills.input: Creator handles, profile links, niche context, sample metrics or content notes
skills.output: Decision-ready creator summary with strengths, risks, fit notes, and next action
skills.best_for: Shortlisting and comparing creators before outreach or testing
skills.handoff: Send approved creators into outreach or brief workflows

skills.problem: How to write creator outreach that gets clearer replies and better next steps?
skills.input: Creator info, offer angle, proof points, timing, desired CTA
skills.output: Primary outreach draft, follow-up draft, personalization hook, CTA options
skills.handoff: Use with creator analysis shortlist and proof assets

skills.problem: How to reply to public comments without sounding robotic or pushy?
skills.input: Comment text, product context, common objections, reply goal
skills.output: Intent-tagged short replies with alternate version and optional CTA
skills.best_for: TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, X, and product-page comments
skills.handoff: Store winning reply patterns in comment SOPs and templates

skills.problem: How to turn reviews and complaints into clear patterns and action priorities?
skills.input: Reviews, complaints, refund notes, support snippets
skills.output: Pattern summary, evidence snippets, likely root causes, and recommended actions
skills.handoff: Convert top patterns into fixes, copy changes, or expectation resets

skills.problem: How to follow up with creators after no reply without sounding annoying or robotic?
skills.input: Original outreach, creator context, offer angle, time since first touch, desired next step
skills.output: Short follow-up sequence + timing recommendation + stop rule
skills.best_for: Recovering stalled outreach and reviving creator conversations
skills.handoff: Store winning follow-up patterns in outreach SOPs and CRM templates

skills.problem: How to test and rank affiliate offer angles before outreach or content production?
skills.input: Product facts, audience segment, candidate angles, proof assets, constraints
skills.output: Ranked angle shortlist + risk notes + next test sequence
skills.best_for: Affiliate and creator teams validating offer positioning before execution
skills.handoff: Use top-ranked angles in outreach scripts and creator brief variants

skills.problem: How to turn product facts into simple, testable content angles?
skills.input: Product facts, audience segment, pain points, proof snippets, constraints
skills.output: Angle list + hook lines + risk notes + test order
skills.best_for: Teams preparing scripts and creator briefs before content production
skills.handoff: Pass top angle ideas into script generation and creator brief workflows

skills.problem: How to refresh TikTok topic ideas when recent posts feel repetitive?
skills.input: Recent topics, comments, audience intent, product context
skills.output: New topic list + opening lines + 7-day post order
skills.best_for: Weekly content refresh when engagement starts dropping
skills.handoff: Use refreshed topics as the next sprint queue for script production

skills.problem: How to check and improve creator briefs before sending them out?
skills.input: Original brief, product facts, must-say points, restrictions, delivery rules
skills.output: Brief health check + risk list + improved brief
skills.best_for: Reducing creator revisions and delivery confusion
skills.handoff: Send improved brief into outreach and collaboration workflows
